title: Random Drawing
description: All item recipes become random, and one more thing...
body:
**All items will now have random recipes!**
And you won’t even need to install extra stuff like JEI or anything—BECAUSE now books with random item recipes will spawn in chests! 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

(Yeah, for now it still uses the built-in crafting book from vanilla Minecraft, but don’t worry, I’ll mercilessly remove it in future mod updates.)

</details>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hA2oXvv99Ew" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


I plan to keep developing the mod, so stay alert😜

If you want to help with development or suggest your ideas — join my Discord server: https://discord.gg/pTJryeWaMc

If you’re curious about me as a person (or as a mentally unstable citizen), you can check out my Telegram channel: https://t.me/+tUNfTl_SdXQyMDEy (careful though, might cause myocardial shock)

Clearly, the author just made the mod to cram in as much advertising as possible.

**"Slibodium – protect your lovely legs with this wonderful product!"**


_I love modrinth developers❤️_
